description: Introduction to Service Mesh — Traffic Management, mTLS, and Observability with Istio
summary: Introduction to Service Mesh — Traffic Management, mTLS, and Observability with Istio
target_audience: Learners who have completed Kubernetes Intermediate 2 (already familiar with RBAC, scheduling, NetworkPolicy, Helm, and monitoring)

lectures.title: Introduction to Service Mesh — Traffic Management, mTLS, and Observability with Istio
objectives: Understand the sidecar proxy-based service mesh architecture and the distinction between the data plane and control plane
Control traffic routing with Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule, and apply automatic mTLS encryption
Leverage the observability capabilities (distributed tracing, metrics) provided by a service mesh
